titleStmt.title: SII 38.271: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 271. (A.R. No. 271 of 1912.) NERUMBŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west base, Tiruvālīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Kampaṇṇa-uḍaiyār (II) Year: Plavaṅga, Mīna, śu. di. 10. Monday, 24th May 1367. A.D. However, the star was Rēvati not Sōdi.

summary.p: Damaged and incomplete. Records a gift of 350 kuḻi of land for providing various food offerings and also for supplying other items to the god of Tiruvānīśuramuḍaiyā nāyanār, on the occasion of tiruvādirai, by Varāgapiḷḷai, son of Chakravartti Kāliṅgarāyan. Other details are not clear.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Irācavipāṭaṉ kampaṇauṭaiyarkku cellāniṉṟa pilavaṅkavaruṣattu miṉanāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakkaṣattu tecamiyum tiṅkaṭ kiḻa
peṟṟa coti nāḷ ttu tirumeṟtaḷiyil poṉṉiṉ Uṭaiyār paḷḷiyarai nācciyār cakkiravartti kāliṅkarāyar makaṉ varākap piḷḷai co ti
ruvāṉicuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār tiruvātiraittirunāḷukku Eṉṉuṭaiya kuṟaivaṟuppukku Amutupaṭikku Arici kalattukkum kaṟi Amutupaṭikku Arici kalattukkum kaṟi Amutu veñcaṉattukkum Ivvūril mutali
mār toṇṭai maṇṭalattu ṉer Etirvāyil vaṭaceriyā ḻāṉ viranallūruṭaiyāṉ 3 100 5 10 Intak kuḻi muṉṉūṟṟaimpatum mikutik kuṟai
Digital edition of SII 38.271 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
